welcome.title: Control Panel
welcome.description:
This is your command center. Monitor sales, inventory, web performance, and team stats all in one place.

Let's walk you through each section.

pills.title: Dashboard Sections
pills.description:
Navigate between different areas of your business:

Commercial: Sales, costs, and overall performance
Inventory: Stock status, brand analysis
Web: Visits, leads, and most viewed vehicles
Sellers: Team ranking and commissions

timeFilter.title: Time & Stock Filters
timeFilter.description:
Adjust the data period:

All time, this year, this month, last 7 days, or a custom date range.

You can also filter between own and consigned vehicles.

stats.title: Key Performance Indicators
stats.description:
Quick summary of what matters most: revenue, expenses, net profit, and vehicles sold.

These numbers update based on the time filter you select.

performanceChart.title: Business Performance
performanceChart.description:
Combined chart showing monthly evolution of sales, costs, web visits, and inventory value.

Hover over data points to see detailed breakdowns for each month.

smartAlerts.title: Alerts
smartAlerts.description:
The system analyzes your data and generates automatic alerts:

Pending sales awaiting approval
Vehicles with too many days in stock
Unattended leads
Brand stocking recommendations

Click any alert to go directly to the action needed.

salesSummary.title: Sales & Costs Summary
salesSummary.description:
Detailed table of each sale with pricing, costs, and profit. Toggle between card and table views.

Switch to the 'Costs Summary' tab to see expense breakdowns per vehicle.

You can also export everything to Excel.

finish.title: All Set!
finish.description:
You now know your Control Panel. Remember you can switch between Commercial, Inventory, Web, and Sellers sections to explore each area.

Click the lightbulb anytime to revisit this tour.
